items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend pottery workshop at a local arts studio. Two days before the session, the studio emailed that the start time has moved three hours earlier, which now conflicts with your work shift.
items.direction: Write an email to the studio coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the schedule conflict the new time has created
Ask whether a later session or a make-up class is available
Describe how you would like the studio to confirm any change
items.subject: New pottery workshop time conflicts with my shift

items.scenario: You booked a guided kayaking tour through a small outdoor adventure company for next Saturday. You just realized you forgot to mention that one person in your group of four has never paddled before and may need extra support.
items.direction: Write an email to the tour organizer. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the beginner in your group and their experience level
Ask whether a guide can stay close to assist that person
Suggest an earlier arrival time so everyone can practice first
items.subject: A first-time paddler joining Saturday's kayak tour

items.scenario: You are a second-year student hoping to switch from the Tuesday lab section to the Thursday one because a new part-time job overlaps with your current section. You want to confirm there is still space before the add/drop deadline.
items.direction: Write an email to your chemistry professor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why your current lab section no longer works
Ask whether the Thursday section has an open spot
Offer to provide your work schedule if it would help
items.subject: Moving to the Thursday chemistry lab section

items.scenario: You recently bought a refurbished tablet from an online electronics seller. After a week the screen began flickering, and the troubleshooting steps in the listing did not fix it. The product is still under the seller's 90-day warranty.
items.direction: Write an email to the seller's support representative. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the flickering problem and when it started
Explain which troubleshooting steps you already tried
Ask how to begin a warranty repair or replacement
items.subject: Flickering screen on my refurbished tablet
